big_problem: Five Bureau tabs still hide behind HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS while APIs return live league rows — League L5 depth is invisible in-product (PARITY League L5).
epic: League L5 — Unhide Bureau tabs with screenshot-ready renderers
slice_title: Unhide Power Rankings Bureau tab with Octo quant renderer
parity_ref: League L5 — hidden Bureau renderers or watermarked export
acceptance_ref: PARITY League row — hidden Bureau renderers
acceptance_commands: node -e "const {HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS,VISIBLE_BUREAU_FEATURES}=require('./apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts');" 2>/dev/null || grep -q 'VISIBLE_BUREAU_FEATURES' apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts && ! grep -q '"power-rankings"' apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts | head -1; rg 'power-rankings' apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts apps/web/components/league/BureauFeatureBody.tsx
